title: OpenAI Just Can’t Beat This TikToker
summary: The dunks on OpenAI's Voice Mode will continue until the model improves.
imageAlt: OpenAI Just Can’t Beat This TikToker
aiSummary: The dunks on OpenAI's Voice Mode will continue until the model improves.
keyPoints: OpenAI Just Can’t Beat This TikToker
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de tecnologia.

multimedia.alt: OpenAI Just Can’t Beat This TikToker
multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada del artículo

fullArticle:
Yesterday, OpenAI released its latest voice model, GPT-Live-1. The company called it “a new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction.” The full-duplex model allows ChatGPT to talk and listen at the same time, giving the back-and-forth a more conversational flow. It’s designed to be smarter, faster, and more natural.

Sounds great! Let’s see how it handles the internet’s one-man voice model red team, TikToker @huskistaken (aka Husk), when he tests out its capabilities by giving the model something simple:

Had to give the new voice model the classic test pic.twitter.com/fQYHbBRNuL

Ooh, so close. Husk gave ChatGPT the straightforward request to tell him how many times the letter E appears in the number “seventeen,” and the voice model managed to get halfway there by answe...
